name: Reimbursement for Destroyed Distilling Property

eligibility.description: The owner must apply within 1 year of destruction and establish that the property was not used in violation of law or that any unlawful use was without their consent or knowledge.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Owners of distilling equipment or materials destroyed by the government during a seizure can claim a reimbursement for the value of the property.
